caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and a distinctive, tall, grey textured wig. He wears glasses and black headphones over his ears, speaking into a large black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins, including a black vest and a yellow "LEE" shirt. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and "LUXURY LIFESTYLE." Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing while he looks toward someone off-screen to his left. The background and equipment remain static throughout the clip.
